title: val-only 10min record (val_bpb:1.1111)
body: Per Discord, the organizers have said it is allowed to train on the validation set. This submission is a simple baseline ablation that trains entirely on the validation shard. Adds a new 10-minute track record folder for a val-only 8xH100 run. Included: - README.md - submission.json - train.log - train_gpt.py This PR only adds a new folder under records/track_10min_16mb, per the submission guidelines. Note: - This run was not performed on Runpod. - It was run on a 2-node HGX H100 cluster with 4 GPUs per node, for 8 H100 GPUs total. Thanks! ---------- edit: I would wait for more confirmation, if there will be a separate held-out data for final evaluation, before indexing on this too much.
